one_time_description: Lake of the Woods Flood Claim Settlement proceeds of $155,740,122 received, offset by Community Trust distributions of $154,502,082
economic_notes: AWZ37 Ventures Inc. and AWZ37 Limited Partnership formed for economic development. Construction in progress includes two duplexes, administration building, wharf and harm reduction clinic. New band office construction project demand loan of $3,500,000 available but unused.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not identified. Fiscal year is 2023 not 2024. Large one-time flood claim settlement of $155.7M received with corresponding community trust distribution of $154.5M resulting in net $1.24M impact. 44% revenue dependence on ISC. Two consolidated subsidiaries: AWZ37 Ventures Inc. and AWZ37 Limited Partnership. Ottawa Trust Fund of $97,013 and RBC Community Development accounts of $1,761,151 included in accumulated surplus. Audit report dated July 15, 2025 — non-compliance with FNFTA posting deadline. TCA net book value estimated from accumulated surplus equity in tangible capital assets of $42,181,057 plus construction in progress components; Schedule 1 figure used as $44,051,482 not directly confirmed from balance sheet excerpt provided.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
